title: Denkard: Encyclopedia of Zoroastrian Knowledge
description: The most comprehensive surviving encyclopedia of Zoroastrian thought: theology, cosmology, ethics, and the structure of the soul.
introduction: The most comprehensive surviving encyclopedia of Zoroastrian thought: theology, cosmology, ethics, and the structure of the soul.

translation.original_text: The greatest wisdom is this: to know oneself; for when a person knows himself, he knows everything.
